name: list_bookings
description: List all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. You can filter by status (upcoming, past, cancelled, unconfirmed) and paginate through results. Returns booking details including attendees, times, status, and meeting URLs.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Number of bookings to return per page.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of bookings to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: afterStart
parameters.description: Filter bookings starting after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: beforeEnd
parameters.description: Filter bookings ending before this ISO 8601 date.

data.title: 30 Minute Meeting between Jane Smith and John Doe
